designSystem.styleGuidelines:
## Brand & Style

This design system is built on the intersection of **High-End Editorial** and **Organic Playfulness**. It moves away from the cluttered visuals typical of pet services, instead embracing a sophisticated, boutique lifestyle aesthetic. The brand personality is authoritative yet warm—resembling a luxury fashion magazine tailored for the modern pet owner.

The design style utilizes **Modern Minimalism** with a **Tactile** twist. It relies on generous whitespace (macro-typography), organic "pebble" shapes, and subtle textures like "stitch" patterns to evoke the feeling of handcrafted boutique quality. The visual response should be one of calm, premium care, and meticulous attention to detail.

## Layout & Spacing

The layout follows a **Fixed Grid** philosophy to maintain an organized, magazine-like structure. 

- **Desktop:** A 12-column grid with a max-width of 1440px. 
- **Margins:** Large 64px margins on desktop create a frame that pushes content toward the center, enhancing the "boutique" exclusivity.
- **Section Gaps:** Significant vertical breathing room (120px) is required between major content blocks to emphasize the premium nature of the brand.
- **Organic Reflow:** While the grid is fixed, decorative "pebble" shapes should break the grid occasionally, sitting behind or bleeding off the edges of containers to provide visual rhythm.

## Elevation & Depth

This design system avoids heavy drop shadows in favor of **Tonal Layers** and **Low-Contrast Outlines**.

Depth is created by stacking **Tailored Teal** surfaces over **Soft Bone** backgrounds. For floating elements like cards or modals, use a very soft, diffused ambient shadow (Opacity: 5%, Blur: 30px) tinted with the Deep Navy color to keep it grounded. 

A "Stitch" motif—a 1px dashed border in Tailored Teal—can be used on container edges to define boundaries without adding visual weight. Glassmorphism (Backdrop blur: 12px) is used sparingly for navigation bars to maintain content visibility during scroll.

## Components

- **Buttons:** Primary buttons are solid **Tailored Teal** with **Soft Bone** text. The "Bright Citrus" button is used exclusively for "Book Now" or final conversion actions. All buttons use Montserrat Uppercase with 0.1em letter spacing.
- **Cards:** Cards should have no borders or very subtle `Soft Bone` (darker shade) borders. Use large internal padding (minimum 32px) to maintain the editorial feel.
- **Input Fields:** Use a "Soft Bone" fill with a 1px solid bottom border in "Tailored Teal" (minimalist style) or a full 0.5rem rounded border for higher-density forms.
- **Chips/Badges:** Use "Pill-shaped" geometry. A Tailored Teal outline with Montserrat Bold (10px) text.
- **Speciality Motif:** Apply a 2px dashed "stitch" line as a separator between sections or as a decorative border-top on footer elements to reinforce the boutique grooming theme.
- **Images:** All photography should feature high-key lighting with dogs in "editorial" poses. Use organic pebble masks for featured gallery items.

## Brand & Style

This design system is built on the intersection of **High-End Editorial** and **Organic Playfulness**. It moves away from the cluttered visuals typical of pet services, instead embracing a sophisticated, boutique lifestyle aesthetic. The brand personality is authoritative yet warm—resembling a luxury fashion magazine tailored for the modern pet owner.

The design style utilizes **Modern Minimalism** with a **Tactile** twist. It relies on generous whitespace (macro-typography), organic "pebble" shapes, and subtle textures like "stitch" patterns to evoke the feeling of handcrafted boutique quality. The visual response should be one of calm, premium care, and meticulous attention to detail.

## Colors

The palette is anchored by **Soft Bone**, which serves as the primary canvas, providing a warmer, more premium feel than clinical white. 

- **Tailored Teal (#0F4C5C):** Used for primary brand elements, key surfaces, and sophisticated accents.
- **Bright Citrus (#FFD166):** Reserved for high-priority calls to action (CTAs) and playful highlights to prevent the design from feeling overly formal.
- **Deep Navy (#1B263B):** The cornerstone of the typographic hierarchy, ensuring maximum legibility and an authoritative editorial tone.
- **Soft Bone (#F5F1ED):** The foundational background color for all pages and container backgrounds.

## Typography

Typography is the primary driver of the premium boutique aesthetic. 

**Playfair Display** is used for all headlines and display text. Its high-contrast strokes and elegant serifs provide the editorial "voice" of the brand. For the largest display roles, a slight negative letter-spacing is applied to create a tighter, more fashionable look.

**Montserrat** handles all functional text. To maintain the boutique feel, body text and labels utilize wider tracking (letter-spacing). All navigation and small labels should be set in uppercase Montserrat with generous tracking to emulate high-end brand tagging.

## Layout & Spacing

The layout follows a **Fixed Grid** philosophy to maintain an organized, magazine-like structure. 

- **Desktop:** A 12-column grid with a max-width of 1440px. 
- **Margins:** Large 64px margins on desktop create a frame that pushes content toward the center, enhancing the "boutique" exclusivity.
- **Section Gaps:** Significant vertical breathing room (120px) is required between major content blocks to emphasize the premium nature of the brand.
- **Organic Reflow:** While the grid is fixed, decorative "pebble" shapes should break the grid occasionally, sitting behind or bleeding off the edges of containers to provide visual rhythm.

## Elevation & Depth

This design system avoids heavy drop shadows in favor of **Tonal Layers** and **Low-Contrast Outlines**.

Depth is created by stacking **Tailored Teal** surfaces over **Soft Bone** backgrounds. For floating elements like cards or modals, use a very soft, diffused ambient shadow (Opacity: 5%, Blur: 30px) tinted with the Deep Navy color to keep it grounded. 

A "Stitch" motif—a 1px dashed border in Tailored Teal—can be used on container edges to define boundaries without adding visual weight. Glassmorphism (Backdrop blur: 12px) is used sparingly for navigation bars to maintain content visibility during scroll.

## Shapes

The shape language is defined by the **"Pebble" motif**. While standard UI components follow a `Rounded` (0.5rem) logic for reliability, decorative containers and image masks should utilize highly irregular, organic radii to mimic smooth river stones or soft organic forms.

Buttons and input fields use a consistent 0.5rem corner radius to feel approachable but professional. Larger cards may use a `rounded-xl` (1.5rem) to further distinguish them as premium content containers.

## Components

- **Buttons:** Primary buttons are solid **Tailored Teal** with **Soft Bone** text. The "Bright Citrus" button is used exclusively for "Book Now" or final conversion actions. All buttons use Montserrat Uppercase with 0.1em letter spacing.
- **Cards:** Cards should have no borders or very subtle `Soft Bone` (darker shade) borders. Use large internal padding (minimum 32px) to maintain the editorial feel.
- **Input Fields:** Use a "Soft Bone" fill with a 1px solid bottom border in "Tailored Teal" (minimalist style) or a full 0.5rem rounded border for higher-density forms.
- **Chips/Badges:** Use "Pill-shaped" geometry. A Tailored Teal outline with Montserrat Bold (10px) text.
- **Speciality Motif:** Apply a 2px dashed "stitch" line as a separator between sections or as a decorative border-top on footer elements to reinforce the boutique grooming theme.
- **Images:** All photography should feature high-key lighting with dogs in "editorial" poses. Use organic pebble masks for featured gallery items.

screens.name: projects/2390425966562094839/screens/db91650533bd4e32a074b3c14c0dcf09
screens.prompt:
Create a complete, production-ready desktop landing page for 'Doggy Stylez Grooming & Boutique'. ### Aesthetic & Identity: - Follow the 'Editorial Boutique' design system: 'Tailored Teal' (#0f4c5c) and 'Soft Bone' (#fdf9f5). - High-fashion editorial feel with asymmetrical grids and overlapping elements. - Use wide-tracked typography (Playfair Display) and a recurring 'stitch' pattern (dashed borders/accents). - Premium, artisanal brand voice. ### Required Sections (in an editorial, non-generic order): 1. **Header**: Navigation links, phone number (229) 344-0689, and 'Book Now' CTA. 2. **Hero**: Use {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_5}} (High-end dog photo). Headline: 'The Art of the Groom. The Soul of the Boutique.' Elevating canine care into an editorial experience. 3. **#Credibility (Artisanal Care)**: Highlight 'Certified Stylists', 'Boutique Curation', and 'Soulful Approach' with icons or elegant text blocks. 4. **Services/Offerings**: Use {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_2}} (Grooming tools). Describe 'Signature Grooming' as a masterclass in canine aesthetics (hydro-massage, ozone treatments, hand-scissoring). 5. **The Boutique**: Use {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_6}} (Boutique interior). Curated sanctuary of luxury for sophisticated pet owners. 6. **About (Our Ethos)**: Deep teal section with text about 'The Stylez Philosophy'—grooming as an act of handcrafted care. 7. **Visit (#visit)**: Include the required empty map panel:
. No fake map image. 8. **Contact (Inquiry Form)**: A custom-validated inquiry form (Full Name, Email, Service Type). 9. **Footer**: Navigation links, social icons, copyright notice, and business address (Sylvester, Albany, United States). ### Technical Requirements: - Full semantic HTML5/CSS/JS. - Responsive logic. - Smooth scrolling. - Form validation UI (visual preview). - Descriptive alt tags. - No placeholder 'lorem ipsum' text. - Address: Sylvester, Albany, United States. Email: dsgalbany@gmail.com. Phone: (229) 344-0689. ## Available Images You MUST include the following images in this design. You must reference them by putting their exact placeholder IDs in `src` attributes or CSS `background-image` rules. Do NOT use external URLs or generate new placeholders. Preserve these IDs exactly as written. Read each image's Description to understand its subject, intended section, and visual role. - {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_2}} Description: A close-up, artistic shot of high-end grooming tools (golden scissors, a marble-handled brush) laid out on a textured linen surface. Soft, natural light. The image should feel like a 'boutique' product shot. Boutique aesthetic, premium materials. Dimensions: 1200x896 Aspect Ratio: 1.34 - {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_5}} Description: A high-end, editorial-style photograph of a perfectly groomed, stylish dog (like a Poodle or Afghan Hound) sitting on a minimalist velvet chair. The background is a clean, neutral studio setting with soft lighting. The vibe is fashion-magazine quality, sophisticated, and premium. Color palette: Teals, soft bones, and warm wood tones. Dimensions: 1376x768 Aspect Ratio: 1.79 - {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_6}} Description: An interior shot of a chic, modern pet boutique corner with designer collars and artisanal treats displayed on minimalist wooden shelves. The lighting is warm and inviting. Editorial quality. Dimensions: 1024x1024 Aspect Ratio: 1.00

screens.title: Doggy Stylez - Digital Flagship

outputComponents.text:
I have completed the digital flagship landing page for Doggy Stylez Grooming & Boutique. 

### Design Rationale:
- **Editorial Composition**: The layout uses asymmetrical grids and strategic whitespace to elevate the brand above typical local business templates, mirroring the "bespoke" nature of their services.
- **Visual Continuity**: I've integrated the "Editorial Boutique" design system, using the Tailored Teal and Soft Bone palette alongside the high-fashion imagery we selected (the Afghan Hound hero and artisanal tool close-ups).
- **Brand Motifs**: The "stitch" aesthetic is applied through dashed border treatments and wide-tracked typography, reinforcing the artisanal, handcrafted ethos of the business.
- **Technical Precision**: The page includes the required semantic structure, a custom-validated inquiry form, and the specific map slot requested, all built with responsive CSS and smooth-scroll interactions.

The full design is now live on your canvas. How would you like to further refine the 'Stylez' experience?

outputComponents.suggestion: Add a mobile version of this page
